title: MEDIATION AND FACILITATION - 211info
text: RESOLVE CENTER FOR DISPUTE RESOLUTION AND RESTORATIVE JUSTICE MEDIATION AND FACILITATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides various mediation and facilitation services, including free landlord/tenant mediation and conflict coaching, community mediation, workplace interventions, and small claims and eviction mediation through Jackson County Circuit Court. 201 West Main Street Suite 3A Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Resident of Jackson or Josephine County Hours: Scheduled as needed Email (541) 770-2468 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 770-2468 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment, or visit website and/or email for more information. FEES: No fee for landlord/tenant mediation, or manufactured dwelling park mandatory mediation. Sliding scale fee available for other services. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm; appointments may be available outside regular hours Services: Mediation Organizational Conflict Resolution Services Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RESTORATIVE JUSTICE IN SCHOOLS EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RESOLVE CENTER FOR DISPUTE RESOLUTION AND RESTORATIVE JUSTICE
